sqlMap.select: select * from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey ClientName FieldOfEntertainment TypeOfServices FromDate ToDate IsCurrentClient LastUpdateUserID ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #ClientName# #FieldOfEntertainment# #TypeOfServices# #FromDate# #ToDate# #IsCurrentClient# #LastUpdateUserID# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey, ClientName, FieldOfEntertainment, TypeOfServices, FromDate, ToDate, IsCurrentClient, LastUpdateUserID, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey = #EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW set
ClientName = #ClientName# ClientName = null FieldOfEntertainment = #FieldOfEntertainment# FieldOfEntertainment = null TypeOfServices = #TypeOfServices# TypeOfServices = null FromDate = #FromDate# FromDate = null ToDate = #ToDate# ToDate = null IsCurrentClient = #IsCurrentClient# IsCurrentClient = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null
where EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey = #EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey = #EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey, ClientName, FieldOfEntertainment, TypeOfServices, FromDate, ToDate, IsCurrentClient, LastUpdateUserID, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey = #EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select EnterSportsClientOfFirmKey, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, ClientName, FieldOfEntertainment, TypeOfServices, FromDate, ToDate, IsCurrentClient, LastUpdateUserID from EnterSportsClientOfFirmLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
